title: Maximum Difference Between Node and Ancestor
hints: Consider the path from the root to any node. The maximum difference must occur between the current node and either the minimum or maximum value on that path.
Use a depth-first search traversal. As you recurse, pass down the minimum and maximum values encountered so far along the current branch.
At each node, calculate the absolute difference with the passed min and max, update the global answer, then recurse with updated min/max values for children.
